headline: Starbucks investors get tough-luck news on AI inventory bet
summary: Corporate America has spent the past two years acting like every problem has an artificial intelligence (AI) solution attached to it. The pitch is always the same. Faster than people. Cheaper than people. More accurate than people. Boardrooms have funded it, consultants have sold it, and ...
